name: marcel
title: Marcel
description: Manage your Marcel quests directly from Raycast. View your quest list and complete tasks without leaving your keyboard.
author: saravenpi

commands.name: quests
commands.title: View Quests
commands.description: View and complete your Marcel quests

preferences.name: apiToken
